series_metadata.series_title: BASS Non-Department of Public Safety Records
series_metadata.series_description: Record series consists of authorized transactions processed via the Business Application Services System (BASS) at Deputy Registrar agencies and the Department of Public Safety that are not associated with the duties of the Department. These transactions include the sale of dog licenses, fishing licenses, license plate frames, license plate hardware, maps, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: N/A ; Electronic: Records are maintained on the BASS database for seven years from the date of validation., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
